name: beads-backed-task-folders
title: Upgrade Trellis for Beads-backed task folders
description: Introduce first-stage Beads-backed task folder support: one Beads issue maps to one Trellis folder via a .bead marker while keeping task.json as compatibility cache.
creator: cses-38
notes: Phase 1 upgrade implemented: add .bead marker plus task.py create --beads-id and task.py link-bead. This links one Beads issue to one Trellis folder while keeping task.json as compatibility cache. No bd calls and no .beads init.
